semantic_matched_intents.quote: Do not comment on your own actions on every step, be concise
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already provides short, direct answers and brief updates at key moments.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Skip any praises, and comments on how everything became better, say "Done!" when the work is finished and keep the summary _short_
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already provides short, direct answers, no preamble greetings, and no trailing end-of-turn summary.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Don't add comments unless it's not obvious why something is being done. If in doubt, don't comment.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already writes a comment only when the WHY is non-obvious by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: short summary in imperative mood

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Only add one when the WHY is non-obvious: a hidden constraint, a subtle invariant, a workaround for a specific bug, behavior that would surprise a reader
